news.title: Musk brands US$52 billion SpaceX-Foxconn Nvidia server order 'fake news'
news.description: Elon Musk has publicly rejected reports that SpaceX placed a roughly US$52 billion order with Foxconn for Nvidia GB300 AI servers, calling the widely circulated claim "fake news" in a post on X on July 20.

news.title: Apple unseats Nvidia to become world's most valuable firm
news.description: Apple overtook Nvidia on Friday to become the world's most valuable company, reshuffling the top ranks of tech heavyweights as investors reassess the outlook for artificial intelligence.

news.title: Meta, Anthropic in talks over potential US$10 billion compute deal
news.description: Meta Platforms is in early talks to lease computing power to Anthropic in a potential deal worth up to US$10 billion over two years, as the social media company considers generating revenue from its expanding AI infrastructure.
